A beautiful city that is enveloped

A quiet city nestled between

A beautiful city with flowing

A small town covered in a

A historic village that has

The fate of many Trainers aiming for

The biggest city in Kanto, shining

A town where the wind blows and

This old village is still surrounded

A town where people and Pokémon

A city that even now bears the

A mysterious mountain village cut

A cave that had collapsed once.

Two small islands lightly floating in

A tower that’s said to have a

A spacious and beautiful park. It’s

An old building that has been reused

A place where you can find a

Deep underground, it’s connected to

When SLOWPOKE are thirsty, they come

A beautiful bridge that stretches
